title: blockUI
text: blockUI Disables user interaction for the current widget. blockUI() Arguments None Exceptions None Return value None Description The framework calls the blockUI() function to inform the widget to disable user interaction, for example, when executing a server trigger and synchronizing the data changes with the server. It is called when the framework is about to start some asynchronous processes. The users should not interact with the widget during the execution of asynchronous processes to avoid race conditions.
